description: Style NoteColour-happy slippers for girls from adidas. The printed design on the insole is sure to appeal to all those who love the sea! Pair them with a similar toned tee and fitted denims or capris. Product DetailsSea Green sandals with synthetic thong style straps, an ankle strap and a toe separatorSmooth footbed with cool prints all overTPU outsole with herringbone lugsMaterial and CareRubberWipe off dirt with a moist clothDo not machine wash
